allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Smart Green PWA — full component architecture with live features' --body ' *)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 45984 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, Path })
